title: Strategy-Based Retry
description: Implement a 'RetryRunner' that takes an 'ExceptionStrategy' object. The strategy defines 'should_retry(exception)' and 'get_delay(attempt)'.
test_script:
import unittest
from retry_core import RetryRunner
from strategies import FixedDelayStrategy
class TestRetry(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_strategy(self):
        s = FixedDelayStrategy(delay=0.01)
        r = RetryRunner(s)
        # Test logic...
